Key Landmark: 100 m from Jeevana School; behind Dolphin School
Amenities: 24/7 Surveillance; 24 Hrs Backup Electricity; 24 Hrs Water Supply; Dedicated Parking; Gym (2500 sq ft); Play Area; Swimming Pool; Event Hall
Description: Visvas Vidhatri offers premium 2BHK & 3BHK homes in the serene Ponmeni neighbourhood, just 100 metres from Jeevana School and behind Dolphin School, making it ideal for families whose children can walk to school safely. The project focuses on modern, metro-style living with amenities including a swimming pool, a 2500 sq ft gym, a dedicated kids' play area and an exclusive hall for events. Layouts are designed for natural ventilation and light, with strategically placed openings for airflow. The gated community emphasises safety with built-in CCTV surveillance, 24/7 security and 24/7 inverter backup for uninterrupted power. Prime location convenience includes two-minute delivery from McDonald's, Domino's and Instamart.

Key Landmark: 5 min to Madurai Junction; 8 min to Meenakshi Amman Temple; 3 min to Bypass Road; 5 min to Immayilum Nanmai Tharuvar temple
Amenities: 24/7 Surveillance; 24 Hrs Backup Electricity; Gym (A/C); Lawn; Play Area; Walking Track; Yoga Deck
Description: Madhyapuri at Ellis Nagar offers luxury 3 BHK apartments at the heart of the city (Madhyapuri is the original name of the Immayilum Nanmai Tharuvar temple locality, 5 minutes away). Each apartment has three spacious bedrooms, two sit-outs, a pooja room and a modern modular kitchen. Living areas are filled with natural light through large windows. Amenities include a double-height lobby and reception, an air-conditioned gym, landscaped gardens, a dedicated children's play area and walking spaces. The development comprises 46 premium 3 BHK residences, each with a 5-foot-wide sit-out in the living room and a sit-out in the master bedroom. Additional finishes: Stilt + 5 floors, vitrified tiles in living/dining (4'x2') and bedroom/kitchen (2'x2'), paver-block stilt parking, anti-skid ceramic bathroom tiles, and power backup for all lights and fans.

Description: Aparna is located adjacent to other Visvas projects (Viprosaa, Aprameya and Shreyas) and is designed to enhance residents' standard of living. Studio units are designed as ideal workspaces or for single people, with an open layout combining living room and kitchen and a separate enclosed bathroom, making them an affordable, budget-friendly option. The community includes an indoor badminton court, indoor game space, table tennis, yoga deck, children's play area, open-air theatre and a tree-lined driveway within a green, secure gated environment. Finishes: Stilt + 5 floors, MS handrail, vitrified tiles (2'x2') in living/dining and bathroom/kitchen, paver-block stilt parking, anti-skid ceramic bathroom tiles, power backup for all lights and fans.

The community offers an indoor badminton court, indoor game space, table tennis, a yoga deck for meditation and wellness, a children's play area, an open-air theatre for gatherings and movie nights, and a tree-lined driveway, all within a secure gated environment with well-maintained greenery. Description: Visvas Ajita is a villa community located adjacent to other Visvas projects (Viprosaa, Aprameya and Shreyas), set away from the bustle of city life yet close to urban comforts, with easy access to top schools. Residents are surrounded by commercial shopping centres, grocery stores, restaurants and entertainment venues within minutes. Ajita offers 3 BHK and 4 BHK villa configurations, an ideal balance for families who want to stay near one another while preserving independence. Amenities include a clubhouse, gym, swimming pool, lawn, play area, table tennis, yoga deck, WiFi, dedicated parking, and 24/7 surveillance, water supply and backup electricity.

Address: Viprosaa Enclave, Aprameya Sector, Melakkal Main Road, Thuvariman, Madurai
Key Landmark: Thuvariman; near the Visvas Aprameya 150-villa community
Amenities: 24/7 Surveillance; 24 Hrs Backup Electricity; 24 Hrs Water Supply; Air Conditioning; Clubhouse; Dedicated Parking; Gym; Open Air Theater; Play Area; Swimming Pool; Walking Track; WiFi; Yoga Deck
Description: Visvas Amita offers premium 3 BHK duplex villas; Phase I comprises 40 villas. The ground floor has a living room, kitchen, dining and a bedroom; the first floor has a family room and two bedrooms. Each villa includes parking for two cars, a backyard utility space and an optional kitchen garden. Sports and recreational amenities include a gym, community hall, yoga deck, children's play area, walking track, open green space, rooftop party space and indoor game space. Essential amenities include an elevated ground level, blacktop roads, wayfinding signs, landscaping and avenue trees, underground cabling for power and telecom, a pneumatic water supply system, a sewage treatment plant, and 24/7 power backup and CCTV. Amita is part of a well-established community of 250+ completed homes in Thuvariman, close to the Visvas Aprameya 150-villa community. Visvas has been a trusted Madurai developer for over three decades.
